docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-02-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---NINA SAFDIE. SPANISH INTERPETER ORDERED FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, RONAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, RONAN AS TO DEFENDANT SANEAUX, CARLOS DBA EB AUTO SPORT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, RONAN AS TO DEFENDANT SANEAUX, CARLOS DBA EB AUTO SPORT
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, RONAN AS TO DEFENDANT SANEAUX, CARLOS DBA EB AUTO SPORT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. SPANISH INTERPRETER---SHANNON RAINTREE WAS PRESENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
